response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands a director-level IC Principal Engineer with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Candidate has roughly 13-14 years of post-degree experience, no demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, no advanced degree, and no track record of cloud/AI strategy at the scale or seniority required. Recent AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq) is too nascent to support a Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience across web, mobile, embedded
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Seniority gap: senior IC profile, not director-level Principal
No demonstrated cloud/AI strategy advisory experience with customers or partners
